title: Speed challenge: quick draft
description: Type a quick draft message at speed
text: Hey team, just got off the call with the client. They want to push launch by two weeks and add the new feature we discussed. Can we sync at 4 today to plan? Quick chat — 15 minutes max.

tips.target: Hey team, just got off the call with the client. They want to push launch by two weeks and

tips.text: Practice writing what you would actually send

tips.target: add the new feature we discussed. Can we sync at 4 today to plan? Quick chat — 15 minutes max.

character_tips.anna: Quick team message. Real work pace.
character_tips.maxim: Draft writing at 83 WPM = pro speed for daily work.
